conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Style Constraints
seed_instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days.
org_constraint: The email must be tailored for a professional audience, ensuring clarity and avoiding jargon.
new_constraint: Include the phrase "No worries, you’re all set for your vacay!" in the email.
instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days. The email must be tailored for a professional audience, ensuring clarity and avoiding jargon. Include the phrase "No worries, you’re all set for your vacay!" in the email.
response:
<|channel>thought
Employee.
Approve requested vacation days.
Professional, clear, no jargon.
"No worries, you’re all set for your vacay!"

    *   Subject Line: Clear and informative.
    *   Salutation: Professional (e.g., Dear [Name] or Hi [Name]).
    *   The Approval: State clearly that the request is approved.
    *   Dates: Confirm the specific dates.
    *   Handover/Next Steps: Briefly mention coverage or a handover plan (standard professional practice).
    *   The Required Phrase: "No worries, you’re all set for your vacay!"
    *   Closing: Professional sign-off.

    *   *Subject:* Vacation Request Approval - [Employee Name]
    *   *Body:*
        Hi [Employee Name],
        I am writing to confirm that your vacation request for [Dates] has been approved.
        Please make sure to coordinate with the team regarding your current projects and ensure a smooth handover before you head out.
        No worries, you’re all set for your vacay!
        Best regards,
        [My Name]

    *   *Professional?* Yes.
    *   *Clear?* Yes.
    *   *No jargon?* Yes.
    *   *Required phrase included?* Yes.

    *   *Subject:* Vacation Request Approval: [Dates]
    *   *Body:*
        Dear [Employee Name],

        I am writing to formally approve your vacation request for the period of [Start Date] to [End Date].

        Before you head out, please ensure that your current tasks are up to date and that you have coordinated with the team regarding any necessary coverage during your absence. If there are specific projects that need a handover, please let me know so we can plan accordingly.

        No worries, you’re all set for your vacay!

        Best regards,

        [Your Name]
        [Your Title]<channel|>Subject: Vacation Request Approval - [Employee Name]

Dear [Employee Name],

I am writing to formally approve your vacation request for the period of [Start Date] to [End Date].

Before you head out, please ensure that your current projects are up to date and that you have coordinated with the team regarding any necessary coverage during your absence. If there are specific tasks that require a handover, please let me know so we can make the necessary arrangements.

No worries, you’re all set for your vacay!

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]<turn|>
